narrative:
Butler East (precinct in Mercer County) has 626 registered voters, with 42.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 53.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 49.7 percentage points.
